yes

--- Cecilia Steen cecilia.steen@gmail.com wrote:

The Financial Accounting class, part 1, Tatiana
Ekkert wants to take
costs $645 for 10 sessions in fall at NYU. Is this
OK to pay for?

Pls click on link if you want class description.

http://www.scps.nyu.edu/departments/course.jsp?catId=2&courseId=65368

Cecilia

On 6/27/06, Tatiana Ekkert tanya_ekkert@yahoo.com
wrote:

Hello Cecilia. This is Tatiana.
I can't take off from my job. I work Monday,
Tuesday, Friday from 8 00 pm.
So I was thinking about accounting courses. I want
to go on fall for
Financial Accouning: Part 1. Thay have different
scedual, and by that time I
will ask to change my scedual or I find another
job. (Its summer time, so
its hard to find a job; and they just change my
scedual, so they will not
change it again).
Shoulde I enroll my name in the list of NYU, or
its possible and better to
do later?
Please give me call (7188011116) or send me email
back, when u get a
chance.
Thank You very much for Your passion.
